underlying_goal: Investigate why Phase 57.3 failed to produce an invocable /gsdr:audit skill, capture signals/deliberations about the process gap, and set up a new phase (57.4) to properly build the audit skill with an investigatory audit type
friction_detail: Claude initially asked questions already answered in CONTEXT.md/DISCUSSION_LOG.md, tried to spawn planner without an agent, and miscounted the next phase number as 57.5 instead of 57.4
brief_summary: User wanted to diagnose and remediate a gap where Phase 57.3 didn't deliver an audit skill; they successfully captured a signal, opened a deliberation, escalated the work to Phase 57.4, and handed off cleanly for next session.
